note: Resolved a source conflict via the actual diagram (QNS_4593.jpg) + rules. Diagram: vertical road (white N->S, blue S->N) is MAIN (Головна дорога diamond at SE corner faces blue); horizontal road (yellow from W; tram+black from E) is SECONDARY (Уступіть дорогу triangle on yellow's approach). Passage order: white+blue (main, oncoming straight, no conflict) FIRST; then tram (secondary, but 16.12 gives rail priority over non-rail on equal footing); then black (secondary straight); yellow turns LEFT crossing oncoming black so yields to it -> yellow LAST. Exact-key pdrtest.com states 'Правильна відповідь - Жовтий автомобіль'; green-way/vodiy/manualov-aggregate agree; alt_read=2 corroborates. Lone dissent testpdr.online (=manualov) marks Трамвай, which is rule-INCONSISTENT (a 16.12-priority rail vehicle on the secondary road cannot be last among that group) -> bad answer key. Prior audit pass that trusted testpdr (current_correct) is superseded. Stored current_answer=1 (Трамвай) is WRONG; correct is 2 (Жовтий автомобіль).
